name: 7.5'x7.7' Hexagon Macrame Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella Beige with Faux Wood Pole - Threshold™
description:
Stay comfortable by blocking out direct sun with this Hexagon Macrame Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella from Threshold™. Supported on a rust-resistant metal frame, this outdoor market umbrella features a hexagonal canopy made from soft fabric for helping you stay cool under the sun. Featuring a push-up lift type and equipped with a push-button tilt for more angles of shading, it features a macrame design in a beige hue with a fringed hem in white to add artistic flair to your patio, balcony or porch. Plus, it comes with a bag for easy carrying.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
